title: draba rupestris var. glabrata
intro: Draba rupestris var. glabrata, also known as alpine whitlowgrass, is a small flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Draba rupestris var. glabrata include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and ease respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Draba rupestris var. glabrata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
